projects.title: AgentEscrow
projects.description: Cross-chain payment infrastructure with AI agent integration. Agents escrow, validate, and release payments automatically via x402 protocol.
projects.learned: Built 4 Solana programs (agent-registry, job-escrow, dispute-resolver, reputation). Withdrew due to time constraints — code preserved for cross-chain reuse.

projects.title: Kite AI — Agentic Commerce
projects.description: Autonomous AI agents that discover, decide, and settle on-chain. Dynamic Strategy Engine for yield optimization and market analysis.
projects.learned: AgentEscrow contracts adapted for Kite AI chain. AAE narrative complete.

projects.title: Swarms ACM — LP Monitor Agent
projects.description: DeFi LP position monitor published to Swarms Marketplace. Real-time price tracking, IL calculation, and rebalance alerts.
projects.learned: Wrapping existing 541-line LP Monitor skill into Swarms marketplace agent. 300-400 lines new code.

projects.title: Bags FM — Agent Trading Desk
projects.description: Memecoin launchpad integration with AI agent trading capabilities. Solana-based.
projects.learned: 5-module scaffold built, Bags SDK installed. Awaiting API keys.

projects.title: AAE DeFi Milestones
projects.description: Automated DeFi portfolio management with concentrated liquidity monitoring, IL tracking, and milestone-based progression.
projects.learned: Live LP monitoring with alert-once logic. +302% cumulative return. Multi-pool support.

projects.title: Let's FG Travel Agent
projects.description: Voice-first travel planning agent. Natural language flight/hotel search, price tracking, and booking automation.
projects.learned: Voice-first interface for travel planning. Pipecat integration.

projects.title: Hermes Kanban
projects.description: TUI-based kanban board for autonomous agent task management. Real-time task tracking and handoffs.

projects.title: Birdeye BIP
projects.description: On-chain market data adapter for Birdeye ecosystem. Real-time price feeds, order book data, and volume metrics.

projects.title: Tech Payment Router
projects.description: Ethereum payment router with x402 protocol support. Automated recurring payments and micro-transaction routing.
